<?php /* * This file is part of Psy Shell. * * (c) 2012-2026 Justin Hileman * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Psy\Output; use Symfony\Component\Console\Output\StreamOutput; /** * A passthrough pager is a no-op. It simply wraps a StreamOutput's stream and * does nothing when the pager is closed. */ class PassthruPager extends StreamOutput implements OutputPager { /** * Constructor. * * @param StreamOutput $output */ public function __construct(StreamOutput $output) { parent::__construct($output->getStream()); } /** * Writes a message to the output. * * @param string $message A message to write to the output * @param bool $newline Whether to add a newline or not */ public function doWrite($message, $newline): void { parent::doWrite($message, $newline); } /** * Close the current pager process. */ public function close() { // nothing to do here } }
